Rotation notation intro: For simplification reasons, the doc roughly uses the default keybinds on PC to represent abilities. Below you can find a legend of commonly used keys and their meaning:
Rotation notation P: Plunge Attack (HP = High Plunge; LP = Low Plunge)
Rotation notation text: Parenthesis/brackets may be used to specify when actions are performed less frequently, such as on the first rotation only, when available, or when optional.
Rotation notation number intro: Numbers are sometimes used to specify the number of times an action is performed.
Rotation notation example: For example, 5N2CJP should be understood as performing two Normal Attacks into a Charged Attack followed by a Jump and Plunge Attack, five times.
Not found message: This page does not exist, but the homepage knows the way back.
